motif.name: ritornello_subject
motif.notes: Rhythm corrected: original [0.5,0.5,0.5,0.5,1.0] summed to 3 beats, not a multiple of the 4-beat bar (_check_bar_alignment rejected it -- phase would drift against the barline every repeat). Fixed by extending the final held note from 1.0 to 2.0 beats, preserving the four-quick-steps-then-a-hold character and giving the ritornello a clearer landing to return to on each recurrence.
